titleStmt.title: SII 9.238: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 238. (A.R. No. 476 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE WEST WALL OF THE VIRABHADRA TEMPLE AT HOLAL, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 5th year of the reign of the Chālukya king, Jagadēkamalladēva, Dundubhi, Āshāḍha, śu. 1 Sō (i.e., Sōmavāra) corresponding probably to A.D. 1142 May 27, Wednesday, not Monday. It records that Aṇukapallavarāya, an officer under Vīra-Pāṇḍyadēva, Sāvidēva and his father Uyyavanda-Daṇḍanāyaka made a grant of the toll on three lakhs of arecanuts, for the service of the god Gavaṟēśvaradēva of Gaṇḍarādityana-Hoḷal.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmaccāḷukya jagadēkamallavarṣada 5 duṁdubhisaṁvatsarada Āṣāḍha suddha 1 sō
vyatīpāta saṁkramaṇadaṁdu vīrapāṁḍyadēvara Adhikāri vīrapāṁḍyaAṇukapallava
rāyaruṁ Uyyavaṁdadaṁḍanāyakaru magasāvidēvanuṁ gaṇḍarādityanahoḷala gavaṟēśva
radēvargge mūṟu lakka Aḍakeya suṁka vaḍḍalāuḷa hejjuṁkamaṁ biṭṭa
ru Ī dharmmamaṁ pātipāḷisuvaru Aynūrvvaru Ī dharmmamanaḷiva
ru vāraṇāsiyal brāhmaḷaruṁ kavileyuṁ vadhisida .
Digital edition of SII 9.238 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
